# Task: Calibrate baseline auto-initialization — remove dead end

> Task ID: FORGE-S12-T01
> Sprint: [FORGE-S12](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📋 planned
> Estimate: S

## Description

When calibrationBaseline is absent from .forge/config.json, /forge:calibrate computes and writes the initial baseline (MASTER_INDEX.md hash + completed sprint IDs) instead of dead-ending with 'run /forge:init'. Mirrors init Phase 5 behavior.
